title: Satisfactory Planner
description: A client-side utility mod that adds a fully interactive, Satisfactory-style project planner. See a complete crafting tree, track required resources against your inventory, and manage your building goals directly in-game.
body:
Tired of alt-tabbing to a wiki or scribbling notes for complex recipes from your favorite tech mods? **Satisfactory Planner** brings the powerful and intuitive project management UI from Satisfactory directly into Minecraft!

This is a client-side mod that adds a dynamic, on-screen HUD to help you plan, track, and execute your crafting projects, from a single piston to an entire factory.

## ✨ Features
*   **Dynamic Crafting Tree HUD:** An elegant, on-screen display shows you a complete, multi-level tree of all ingredients required for your chosen item.
*   **Real-Time Tracking:** The HUD automatically checks your inventory and updates in real-time, showing you exactly what you have and what you still need (`11/64 Cobblestone`). Completed items are marked with a green check!
*   **Interactive Planning Manager:** Press a key (`K` by default) to open a dedicated screen where you can:
    *   Change the target amount of items to craft using `[+]` and `[-]` buttons.
    *   Manually type in the exact number you need (e.g., `1024`).
    *   Remove projects you no longer need.
*   **Seamless EMI Integration:** Simply hover over any item in the EMI item list and press `P` to add it to your plan. It also works with items in your inventory!
*   **Persistence:** Your project list is automatically saved when you close the game and reloaded when you join a world.
*   **Broad Recipe Support:** Supports standard crafting table recipes as well as Furnace, Blast Furnace, and Smoker recipes.

## 🎮 How to Use
*   **Adding a Recipe:** Hover over an item in your inventory or the EMI list and press **P**.
*   **Managing Your List:** Press **K** to open the Planning Manager. Here you can change amounts or delete projects.
*   **Clearing the List:** Press **O** to remove all active projects from the HUD.

## ⚙️ Dependencies
*   **Required:** **NeoForge** for Minecraft 1.21.1.
*   **Highly Recommended:** **EMI** (to add recipes directly from the item list).

---
*This mod was created with the help of an AI assistant. It's a journey from a simple idea to a fully functional tool. We hope you find it useful!*
